headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Jumps But These Fertilizer Stocks Stink; Leisure Plays Cruise Higher (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones rose after President Trump spoke on Iran. A pharma stock tested an entry and cruise equities shined. Some fertilizer plays fell on the stock market today.

headline: Boeing vs Honeywell vs 3M: Which Dip Is the Best Buy Right Now?
summary: Boeing (NYSE: BA), Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON), and 3M (NYSE: MMM) have all pulled back sharply over the past month. Each just reported Q4 2025 earnings, and each tells a very different story about what “dip” actually means. Three Dips, Three Very Different Situations Boeing has taken the hardest hit, falling 12.9% over the past month ... Boeing vs Honeywell vs 3M: Which Dip Is the Best Buy Right Now?

headline: Small Caps Rally, Oil Sinks 8% After Trump's 5-Day Iran Strike Pause: What's Moving Markets Monday?
summary: Iran denies talks as Trump's strike pause sparks relief rally, oil plunge, and surge in beaten-down global equities.
